ada.name: Ada
ada.welcome: Welcome to Nnewi Buka! 👋🏾 I'm Ada, your virtual waitress. Browse the menu and tap any dish to learn more!
ada.idle: Take your time! When you're ready, tap 'Call Waiter' and I'll send someone to your table right away 😊

categoryMessages.soups: Our soups are made fresh every morning! 🥣 Tap any soup to learn more about it.
categoryMessages.swallows: Pounded yam is our most popular swallow! 😋 It pairs perfectly with any soup on our menu.
categoryMessages.rice: Our Jollof Rice is smoky and cooked the party way 🍚 — the real deal, I promise!
categoryMessages.grills: Everything here is grilled fresh to order 🔥 The suya is an absolute must-try!
categoryMessages.small-chops: Perfect for sharing or a light snack! Our puff puff is made fresh every morning 🤤
categoryMessages.drinks: ⭐ Special today: Buy 1 Guinness Stout, get 1 absolutely FREE! Don't miss it 🍺

items.name: Egusi Soup
items.description: Rich in protein and healthy fats, cooked with assorted meat
items.ada: Egusi is loaded with protein and healthy fats — gives you real energy! Great with pounded yam 💪

items.name: Ofe Onugbu
items.description: Bitterleaf soup with assorted meat and stockfish — a true Igbo classic
items.ada: A true Igbo classic! The slight bitterness is what makes it special. Cooked just like mama would 😋

items.name: Oha Soup
items.description: Seasonal delicacy with cocoyam thickener and oha leaves
items.ada: Oha leaves are packed with vitamins A and C — very nutritious and only available seasonally! 🌿

items.name: Ogbono Soup
items.description: Draw soup with assorted meat — smooth and filling
items.ada: Ogbono is great for digestion and keeps you full for hours. A real comfort soup 👌

items.name: Nsala Soup
items.description: White soup with fresh catfish — light and fragrant
items.ada: Light and fresh! The catfish in this soup is delivered same morning. Very popular with our guests 🐟

items.name: Ofe Akwu
items.description: Palm fruit soup — a true Eastern Nigerian classic
items.ada: Rich in vitamin E and antioxidants — good for your skin and heart too! A real Eastern classic ✨

items.name: Pounded Yam
items.description: Smooth and satisfying — our most popular swallow
items.ada: Our number one! Freshly pounded, smooth and stretchy — pairs with literally any soup on this menu 🤩

items.name: Eba (Garri)
items.description: Light and quick — perfect everyday meal
items.ada: Eba is light on the stomach, very filling, and quick to prepare. A Nigerian staple for a reason!

items.name: Fufu
items.description: Traditional and filling — the original swallow
items.ada: High in resistant starch which feeds the good bacteria in your gut — keeps you healthy inside out! 💚

items.name: Semolina
items.description: Smooth texture, easy on the stomach
items.ada: Super smooth and easy to swallow — popular with our older guests and those with sensitive stomachs 😊

items.name: Wheat
items.description: High in fibre — the healthy swallow choice
items.ada: The healthiest swallow we offer! High in fibre and nutrients — great for managing weight too 🌾

items.name: Jollof Rice
items.description: Smoky party-style jollof — cooked over firewood
items.ada: This is the real deal! Smoky bottom-pot jollof cooked over firewood 🍚🔥 You will not regret it!

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Colourful and flavourful with mixed vegetables and proteins
items.ada: Colourful, flavourful, and loaded with vegetables — great for kids and adults alike! 🥕

items.name: White Rice & Stew
items.description: Classic comfort food with rich tomato stew
items.ada: Classic Nigerian comfort food — rich tomato stew, perfectly seasoned. Sometimes simple is best 🍅

items.name: Coconut Rice
items.description: Fragrant and creamy — our weekend special
items.ada: Our weekend special! Fragrant coconut rice that sells out fast — if you see it, grab it! 🥥

items.name: Peppered Chicken
items.description: Spicy and tender — marinated and grilled to perfection
items.ada: Marinated for hours before hitting the grill — the flavour goes all the way in! Seriously good 🔥

items.name: Suya
items.description: Skewered beef with our secret spice blend
items.ada: Our suya spice blend is a family secret — you will not find this flavour anywhere else in Nnewi! 🥩

items.name: Peppered Gizzard
items.description: Crunchy, spicy, and completely addictive
items.ada: High in protein, low in fat — and absolutely addictive! Most people order a second plate 😄

items.name: Peppered Fish
items.description: Fresh catfish, heavily peppered and grilled
items.ada: Fresh catfish delivered every morning, heavily peppered the Anambra way 🐟🔥 A real crowd favourite!

items.name: Peppered Ponmo
items.description: Soft cow skin, peppered and stewed
items.ada: A Nigerian favourite! Soft, chewy ponmo in our peppered sauce — great as a side or on its own 😋

items.name: Puff Puff
items.description: 6 pieces — soft, sweet, freshly fried every morning
items.ada: Made fresh every single morning — soft, golden, and slightly sweet. The smell alone will get you! 🤤

items.name: Meat Pie
items.description: Flaky pastry filled with spiced minced meat
items.ada: Baked fresh, never reheated! Flaky golden crust with perfectly spiced filling inside 🥧

items.name: Moi Moi
items.description: Steamed bean pudding — high in plant protein
items.ada: Moi moi is loaded with plant protein — great for energy, muscle, and keeping you full 💪

items.name: Spring Roll
items.description: 4 pieces — crispy fried rolls with vegetable filling
items.ada: Crispy on the outside, loaded with veggies inside — perfect for sharing with the table! 🥬

items.name: Buns
items.description: Sweet fried dough balls — a Nigerian childhood classic
items.ada: A Nigerian childhood classic! Sweet, soft, and dangerously addictive. You have been warned 😄

items.name: Coca-Cola
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada: Nothing beats an ice cold Coke with your meal — especially with the spicy dishes! 🥤

items.name: Fanta Orange
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada: Sweet and fizzy — great for cooling down after our peppered dishes! 🍊

items.name: Sprite
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada: Light and refreshing — perfect to cleanse the palate between dishes 💚

items.name: Maltina
items.description: Rich in B vitamins — great energy boost
items.ada: Maltina is loaded with B vitamins — gives you a natural energy boost without the alcohol! 🌟

items.name: Water (50cl)
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada: Stay hydrated! Especially important if you are having the peppered or spicy dishes 💧

items.name: Trophy Lager
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada: Ice cold Trophy — smooth, crisp, and refreshing. The Anambra man's drink of choice! 🍺

items.name: Star Lager
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada: Star Lager — Nigeria's favourite! Smooth and refreshing. Best enjoyed ice cold 🌟🍺

items.name: Guinness Stout
items.description: ⭐ Special offer today: Buy 1 get 1 FREE!
items.ada: ⭐ TODAY ONLY: Buy 1 Guinness Stout, get 1 completely FREE! Call your waiter now to grab this deal 🍺🎉

items.name: Chivita Juice
items.description: Assorted flavours — apple, orange, mango
items.ada: 100% fruit juice — great for kids, non-drinkers, or anyone who wants something sweet and healthy 🧃
